sectionsModified: Create a member role — step 5 corrected: replaced 'Enter a Code name' with optional expand instruction reflecting HasAutomaticCodeNameGenerationOption=True and IsCollapsed=True
docFactsUsed: AREA-002: MemberRoleInfo and MemberRoleMemberInfo types support role creation and member-role assignment.
AREA-012: Admin resource strings updated. Member role admin UI pages (listing/create/edit) already present.
AREA-002: MemberRoleInfo CodeName field has HasAutomaticCodeNameGenerationOption=True, IsCollapsed=True — auto-generates from display name, starts collapsed
gaps: Screenshot images (MemberRolesList.png, MemberRoleCreate.png, MemberRoleAssignMembers.png) are placeholders — actual screenshots need to be captured from the admin UI.
notes: Attempt 3 (FINAL) — single fix from accuracy reviewer feedback: Step 5 in 'Create a member role' replaced. Old: 'Enter a Code name that uniquely identifies the role in the system.' New: 'Optionally, expand the Code name section to customize the automatically generated identifier.' This reflects the source code reality that the CodeName field has HasAutomaticCodeNameGenerationOption=True (auto-generates from display name) and IsCollapsed=True (starts collapsed). The old step incorrectly implied manual entry was required. The 'Edit a member role' section (line 104) was intentionally left unchanged — it lists Code name as an editable field, which is correct for the edit scenario where the field is already visible.
